---
title: "Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [year, title, funder, categories]
  field-display-names:
    year: "Year"
    funder: "Funding Body"
    title: "Project Title"
    categories: "Cluster"
---

## Funded projects & initiatives {style="border-bottom: none;"}

An overview of ongoing and completed research projects across our three research clusters.

---
